sources: Eurostat ilc_di01 (equivalised disposable income by decile, IT, 2023)
Eurostat hbs_str_t223 (structure of consumption expenditure by COICOP & income quintile, IT, 2020 wave)
Eurostat hbs_exp_t133 (mean consumption expenditure by income quintile, per adult equivalent)
Eurostat tec00131 / nasa_10_ki (household saving rate, IT)
notes: Deciles are annual EQUIVALISED net disposable income in EUR (OECD-modified scale). categoryShares are % of total consumption expenditure remapped from COICOP to the app's categories (middle of the distribution). quintileExpenditureMultipliers scale mean per-adult-equivalent expenditure to each income quintile; per-quintile category structure is derived in code via a documented income gradient. avgHouseholdEquivFactor converts between per-household and per-adult-equivalent figures.
